title.en: China-to-Saint Lucia Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入圣卢西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入聖露西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Saint Lucia SLBS standards context, NURC regulation, LUCELEC grid-connection requirements, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC expectations, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, coastal hurricane and salt-mist derating, and sea-freight import context via Port Castries — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与圣卢西亚SLBS标准背景、NURC监管、LUCELEC并网要求、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC要求、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、沿海飓风和盐雾降额以及经卡斯特里港海运进口背景——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與聖露西亞SLBS標準背景、NURC監管、LUCELEC併網要求、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC要求、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、沿海颶風和鹽霧降額以及經卡斯翠港海運進口背景——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLBS standards determination, NURC regulatory approval, LUCELEC grid-connection approval, customs determination, Port Castries import clearance, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, installers, and project developers should verify current Saint Lucia standards, NURC requirements, LUCELEC interconnection conditions, and project-owner specifications with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLBS标准裁定、NURC监管批准、LUCELEC并网批准、海关裁定、卡斯特里港进口放行或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、安装方和项目开发商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行圣卢西亚标准、NURC要求、LUCELEC接入条件及项目业主规格。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLBS標準裁定、NURC監管批准、LUCELEC併網批准、海關裁定、卡斯翠港進口放行或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、安裝方和項目開發商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行聖露西亞標準、NURC要求、LUCELEC接入條件及項目業主規格。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Saint Lucia, the key practical gaps are: (1) Saint Lucia uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz, so frequency matches China but voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline; (2) LUCELEC grid-tied projects should be validated against Saint Lucia utility protection settings, including IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; (3) SLBS and project owners may expect IEC / UK-legacy documentation rather than China-only GB/T certificates; (4) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety and IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence should be supplied for the exact inverter model; (5) coastal hurricane exposure, salt-mist corrosion, thermal derating, spares, and sea freight through Port Castries should be documented. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are not automatically accepted for Saint Lucia projects.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口圣卢西亚时，主要实际差距包括：（1）圣卢西亚使用230/400 V、50 Hz，频率与中国相同，但电压不同于中国220/380 V基准；（2）LUCELEC并网项目应按圣卢西亚公用事业保护整定进行验证，包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（3）SLBS和项目业主可能要求IEC / 英国传统体系文件，而非仅中国GB/T证书；（4）应为具体逆变器型号提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据；（5）应记录沿海飓风暴露、盐雾腐蚀、热降额、备件和经卡斯特里港海运事项。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024不会被圣卢西亚项目自动接受。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口聖露西亞時，主要實際差距包括：（1）聖露西亞使用230/400 V、50 Hz，頻率與中國相同，但電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準；（2）LUCELEC併網項目應按聖露西亞公用事業保護整定進行驗證，包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（3）SLBS和項目業主可能要求IEC / 英國傳統體系文件，而非僅中國GB/T證書；（4）應為具體逆變器型號提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全及IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據；（5）應記錄沿海颶風暴露、鹽霧腐蝕、熱降額、備件和經卡斯翠港海運事項。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024不會被聖露西亞項目自動接受。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
